title: Plesstil

'''Plesstil''' was an astronomical object<ref name="DFRS">''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]''</ref> located in the [[Plesstil system/Legends|Plesstil system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Veragi sector/Legends|Veragi sector]]. A [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] linked Plesstil to the [[Veragi system/Legends|Veragi system]] as well as the northern reaches of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA" />

Plesstil was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Terkuss]], who was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]]<ref name="DFRS" /> in [[14 BBY/Legends|14 BBY]]. At some point by [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]],<ref name="Dates">''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'', which is set during the events of ''[[Dark Force Rising]]'', states that [[Terkuss]] is 23 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old and has served with the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] for at least two years. ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the latter work to [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], so Terkuss must have been [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] in [[14 BBY/Legends|14 BBY]] and must have joined the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] at some point by [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].</ref> Terkuss was conscripted into the [[Imperial Military/Legends|military forces]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Although the new recruit attempted to refuse to serve at first, the Imperials forced Terkuss to cooperate by threatening to [[Mundicide|destroy]] Plesstil.<ref name="DFRS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Plesstil was first mentioned in ''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'', a [[1992]] supplement authored by [[Bill Slavicsek]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="DFRS" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Plesstil [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body Plesstil, in grid square L-3.<ref name="TEA" />
